title: Frozen│疾凍
description: Snow golems can fire snowballs that freeze enemies. Snow golems are immune to most damage while frozen.│雪傀儡發射的雪球可以對敵人造成冰凍。雪傀儡被冰凍時不會受到絕大多數傷害。
body:
# Function│功能
- When a snowball fired by a snow golem hits a mob, it freezes them for 5 seconds. This effect does not apply to players unless you have [Snowball and Egg Knockback](https://modrinth.com/mod/snowball-and-egg-knockback) installed.│雪傀儡發射的雪球擊中生物時，對其造成5秒冰凍。此效果不適用於玩家，除非你安裝了[Snowball and Egg Knockback](https://modrinth.com/mod/snowball-and-egg-knockback)。
- Snow golems are now frozen in powder snow, but do not take freeze damage.│雪傀儡在粉雪中會被冰凍，但是不會受到冰凍傷害。
- While frozen, snow golems are immune to all damage except ```out_of_world, generic_kill```.│雪傀儡在冰凍狀態時，不會受到除了傷害類型為```out_of_world, generic_kill```之外的任何傷害。
- If the snow golem is not in a hot biome, the water beneath it will freeze into ice.│如果雪傀儡不在炎熱的生態域中，則腳下的水會被凍結成冰。
- When in a cold biome, a snow golem has a 0.5% chance of generating powder snow for every block it moves through.│雪傀儡在寒冷生態域中時，每走過一格方塊便有0.5%概率產生粉雪。
- Snow golems will not move while frozen.│雪傀儡在被冰凍時不會移動。

The datapack achieves this effect via a custom enchantment called "frozen_armor", so if you see an enchanted book with the "frozen_armor" enchantment in your Creative Inventory, please ignore it.│該資料包透過名為"frozen_armor"的自訂附魔來實現此效果，因此如果您在創造模式物品欄中看到帶有"frozen_armor"附魔的附魔書，請忽略它。
